response.justification: Bogdan has solid full-stack engineering breadth and roughly 16 years of experience, meeting the minimum tenure bar. However, the role demands director-level AI strategy leadership — advising enterprise customers, shaping cloud product direction, and demonstrating recognized AI expertise through shipped AI products or platforms. His AI exposure is recent (MCP tooling since April 2025) and shallow relative to the seniority required. There is no evidence of cloud architecture depth, enterprise advisory work, or the kind of thought leadership (publications, keynotes, industry recognition) expected at this level. His background is strong for a senior/staff IC but does not align with the scope of a Principal Engineer in AI Strategy.
strengths: 16 years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, meeting the minimum tenure requirement
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective and freelance work, plus public talks and workshops showing some external knowledge-sharing
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq signals awareness of the agentic AI space
concerns: AI expertise is very recent and narrow (MCP tooling since April 2025) — no demonstrated history of building or shipping AI-powered products or platforms at scale
No cloud architecture depth; AWS CDK is mentioned once in passing with no evidence of designing or leading cloud platform strategy
No director-level experience, enterprise advisory history, or indicators of the strategic influence and customer-facing leadership this role requires

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI depth and track record
No strategic or advisory leadership experience
Long engineering tenure with breadth across stacks
